name: ZIPRECRUITER, INC.
summary: Part I Overview ZipRecruiter is committed to transforming the hiring experience. Rather than leaving job seekers to search in isolation or employers to sift through endless noise, ZipRecruiter replaces manual navigation and complex sourcing with intelligent, streamlined connections between job seekers and employers.
